title: helichrysum schimperi
intro: Helichrysum schimperi, also known as African helichrysum, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum schimperi include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
